description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline using the alpine:latest Docker image and defining variables for Docker driver, TLS, and PostgreSQL (POSTGRES_DB, POSTGRES_USER, POSTGRES_PASSWORD, POSTGRES_ENABLED, POSTGRES_VERSION, ROLLOUT_RESOURCE_TYPE). Include the standard GitLab CI templates for build (Jobs/Build), test (Jobs/Test), code-quality (Jobs/Code-Quality), deploy (Jobs/Deploy), browser-performance-testing (Jobs/Browser-Performance-Testing), and security scans (Security/DAST, Security/Container-Scanning, Security/Dependency-Scanning, Security/License-Management, Security/SAST). Define the stages in the order: build, test, deploy, review, dast, staging, canary, production, incremental rollout 10%, incremental rollout 25%, incremental rollout 50%, incremental rollout 100%, performance, cleanup. Add a dast job that runs in the dast stage and is excluded from the master branch (except refs: master). All jobs inherit the alpine image and use the defined variables without additional custom scripts.
